title: Stale GBP/USD rate overstates revenue
expected_symptoms: GBP/USD rate identical to previous day (no drift)
daily_revenue_report does not reconcile to source
root_cause_description: The FX pipeline failed to fetch a fresh GBP/USD rate and reused the previous day's rate, so converted USD revenue deviates from the correct value.
expected_remediation: Refresh FX data for the affected date and regenerate affected revenue reports.
